description: Perform a linearity calibration check on a simulated Multiparameter Monitor using the Vital Signs clinical application. Test the Heart Rate (HR) at 60 BPM, 90 BPM, and 120 BPM, verifying that the Vital Signs app reflects each setting. Save a screenshot showing both the device controls and the Vital Signs app at the 120 BPM test point to /home/ga/Desktop/calibration_120bpm.png. Document the results for all three points in a CSV report at /home/ga/Desktop/calibration_report.csv with the columns: Test_Point, Input_Setting_BPM, Observed_Display_BPM, and Pass_Fail.
